Video.summary: The holdup-proof safe in Gus Lammerson's store proves anything but.
Video.title: The Holdup-Proof Safe

Video.summary: A West Point graduate has trouble adjusting to an Army unit in the West.
Video.title: Lieutenant Bungle

Video.summary: Fred Curry and Jesse Blount feud after they each file claims to the same mine.
Video.title: Feud at Dome Rock

Video.summary: A prospector has hit a vein, and he's not about to share it with anyone, not even his partner.
Video.title: The Breaking Point

Video.summary: A husband and wife catch trouble when they allow an Apache chief's granddaughter to stay with them.
Video.title: Suzie

Video.summary: A dramatization of the life of hat manufacturer John Stetson.
Video.title: The Hat That Wore the West

Image.alt: The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West

Video.summary: John J. Pershing, fresh out of West Point, tracks the renegades who robbed and murdered two Natives.
Video.title: To Walk with Greatness

Video.summary: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.
Video.title: Bloodline

Video.summary: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
Video.title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Image.alt: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Video.summary: An outlaw and teamster help miners.
Video.title: The Debt

Video.summary: A cowboy explores a valley allegedly haunted by monks that were massacred a century earlier.
Video.title: Phantom Procession

Video.summary: A Native acquitted of murder under Sioux law must contend with the white man's 'lynch law' justice.
Video.title: With Honesty and Integrity

Video.summary: Johnny Ringo is an expert gunslinger with a mysterious past; his arrival in town brings concern.
Video.title: The Melancholy Gun

Video.summary: A San Francisco newspaperman with big plans struggles to make his business profitable.
Video.title: The Paper Dynasty

Video.summary: Patrick Manogue is challenged by a gambler as he tries to bring morality to Virginia City, Nev.
Video.title: The Westside of Heaven

Video.summary: John Wheeler is going to even the odds in a fight between meek Arkie Monson and a gunslinger.
Video.title: The Bigger They Are

Video.summary: Pearl Hart emigrates from Canada to commit the last stagecoach robbery in history.
Video.title: The Last Stagecoach Robbery

Video.summary: When Doc Holliday shoots a man who cheated him at cards, he becomes a target himself.
Video.title: The Quiet and the Fury

Video.summary: Widow Lucy Tutaine decides to sue the railroad when her cow is hit by a train.
Video.title: The Train and Lucy Tutaine

Video.summary: A Civil War veteran tries to rid his hometown of terrorists.
Video.title: Coffin for a Coward

Video.summary: The story of Wyatt, Virgil, Morgan Earp and Doc Holliday after their gunfight with outlaws.
Video.title: After the O.K. Corral

Video.summary: A father outsmarts a wily Indian.
Video.title: The Lucky Cow

Video.summary: A charlatan rainmaker sparks a range war.
Video.title: Big John and the Rainmaker

Video.summary: A kindhearted saloon singer nurses a gunfighter back to health.
Video.title: The Left Hand Is Damned

Video.summary: A lawman must choose between love and duty in the midst of a missing persons case.
Video.title: There Was Another Dalton Brother

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: A former Confederate officer tries to help the family of a soldier killed in battle.
Video.title: Paid in Full

Video.summary: Angered by increasing federal mining taxes, the citizens vote to secede from the U.S.
Video.title: Birthright

Video.summary: An Army officer helps a young man track down his sister, who was captured by Natives years before.
Video.title: The Lawless Have Laws

Video.summary: Newspaper editor Carolyn Romney launches a campaign against outlaws terrorizing Durango, Colorado.
Video.title: Mrs. Romney and the Outlaws

Video.summary: A grizzled trail guide is retained to lead a dangerous trek through Native country.
Video.title: Hugh Glass Meets the Bear

Video.summary: A society woman takes over a wagon train when the wagon master is killed in a raid.
Video.title: Lady of the Plains

Video.summary: Ignoring his brother's warnings, young Roy Bean gets involved in a rivalry over a pretty girl.
Video.title: Sense of Justice

Video.summary: Suspicion over a farm and its female owner creates a rift between two mining partners.
Video.title: The Lady and the Sourdough

Video.summary: While serving as scouts, Carson and Godey come across a man who lost everything in a Native raid.
Video.title: Samaritans, Mountain Style

Video.summary: Opportunist Monte Dunning uses the predictions of a fortune teller to intimidate his fellow miners.
Video.title: The Gypsy

Video.summary: A former cowhand shuns progress.
Video.title: A Wrangler's Last Ride

Video.summary: Warren takes an unreasonable dislike to his stepmother after returning to his father's ranch.
Video.title: Siege at Amelia's Kitchen

Video.summary: Deputy Jim Brand hatches a plan to thwart a corrupt railroad lawyer.
Video.title: The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup

Image.alt: The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup

Video.summary: A rancher fights bandits.
Video.title: The Trouble with Taxes
